name: Farfa, Malebranche of the Burning Abyss
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>彼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>岸</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>悪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鬼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ファーファレル
desc:
If you control a monster that is not a "Burning Abyss" monster, destroy this card. You can only use 1 of these effects of "Farfa, Malebranche of the Burning Abyss" per turn, and only once that turn.
● If you control no Spells/Traps: You can Special Summon this card from your hand.
● If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 monster on the field; banish it until the End Phase.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: Sacred Beasts of Chaos

action: Returns banished cards to the field
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
